description: Intapp provides industry-specific software and AI-powered platforms for professional and financial services firms, including CRM, compliance, time billing, collaboration, and deal management products. Its public website mainly presents product information and marketing content.
summary: No public developer integration surface was found on intapp.com beyond a marketing llms.txt; no HTTP APIs, GraphQL endpoints, MCP servers, or CLIs attributable to intapp.com were discoverable from public documentation.
